pi_items.source: Cross-referenced in setup_task.sh (line 23), export_result.sh (line 17), verifier.py (line 49), and task description (line 5)
Task description explicitly states: 'attempt to search for flight \'UA 100\' in the Flight Search or Tracking section' (line 5 of task.json)
Verified in verifier.py (line 33) using metadata.get('required_keywords', ...) and applied at line 97 for content validation. Keywords are semantically appropriate for an offline error scenario.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'test_offline_mode_handling' tests Flight Crew View app behavior when offline. The metadata specifies three configuration parameters: report_path is '/sdcard/offline_test_report.txt' where users document offline errors; flight_query is 'UA 100' (United Airlines flight code) to search while offline; required_keywords are common error-related terms that should appear in the report. The task uses real APK binaries (com.robert.fcView.apk and config splits) installed on an Android AVD emulator (Android 14). The interactive task requires an agent to disable Wi-Fi, attempt a flight search, observe the error behavior, create a report file, and restore connectivity. All metadata values are correctly implemented across setup scripts, verification logic, and task description.
